# ELS_Apartment

> ELS_Apartment is a furnished 55 m² business apartment in Elsbethen at the southern edge of Salzburg, Austria. It is offered for professional stays of 29 nights to 6 months, not as tourist accommodation.

## Primary pages

- [English website](https://elsbethen-apartment.com/): Apartment details, location, availability and booking request.
- [German website](https://elsbethen-apartment.com/de/): Möblierte Wohnung, Lage, Verfügbarkeit und Buchungsanfrage.
- [Booking section](https://elsbethen-apartment.com/#inquire): Live availability calendar and price request.

## Property facts

- Location: Elsbethen-Glasenbach, 5061 Salzburg, Austria.
- Rental type: furnished apartment, corporate housing, business accommodation, employee housing and relocation accommodation.
- Stay duration: minimum 29 nights; maximum 6 months.
- Size: 55 m² with one private bedroom, living room, full kitchen and bathroom.
- Capacity: ideal for 1–2 people; maximum 4 guests using a convertible sofa for two.
- Included: utilities, heating, 5G internet, private washing machine and mountain bike.
- Outdoor space: south-facing loggia and west-facing balcony.
- Parking: free resident street parking, subject to availability.
- Policies: non-smoking, no parties; pets only by prior arrangement.

## Business location

- Red Bull Base: approximately 5–7 minutes on foot.
- Salzburg Old Town: approximately 15 minutes by bus.
- FH Salzburg Urstein: approximately 8 minutes by car; direct bus 160.
- Salzburg Airport: approximately 25 minutes by car.
- Nearby public transport: bus routes 160, 165 and 7.

## Intended guests

The apartment is intended for business travellers, relocating employees, project staff, consultants and corporate guests who need a furnished monthly rental near Salzburg. It is not marketed for holiday or tourist stays.

## Contact

- Email: [hello@elsbethen-apartment.com](mailto:hello@elsbethen-apartment.com)
- Website: https://elsbethen-apartment.com/

## Search topics
